note: Manual layer of dashboard/portfolio-hq.html: everything here comes from live PostHog reads, founder statements, or weekly readouts — not derivable from status.json. Update this file (and bump asOf), then run ./agentic-os refresh — it regenerates portfolio-hq.html as its last step.

founderCommand.title: Confirm Garmin fees + certification checklist before resuming Commercial-tier work
founderCommand.body: A 2026-07-06 research pass found "NO fees" is not confirmed — Garmin's own Agreement reserves future/excess-volume fees, and its public FAQ + Health API page both say commercial use may require a license fee. The full Gate 1-4 certification checklist is also not publicly documented, only Marc-thread-derived. Full findings: RunSmart Web docs/garmin-application/22-OFFICIAL-REQUIREMENTS-VS-MARC-NOTES-2026-07-06.md. GARMIN-STATUS.md's Commercial Terms table already updated to flag Q3/Q4 as unconfirmed rather than "Confirmed."
founderCommand.prompt: Draft a short email to Marc Lussi (or Garmin Partner Services, ticket 213145/213165) asking him to confirm two things in writing before we resume any Commercial-tier Garmin work: (1) the exact fee structure that applies to RunSmart specifically — Garmin's own public Agreement/FAQ/Health API page reserve fees that Marc's "NO fees" note doesn't mention; (2) whether there's a written Gate 1-4 certification checklist beyond what he's told us informally. Read RunSmart Web's docs/garmin-application/22-OFFICIAL-REQUIREMENTS-VS-MARC-NOTES-2026-07-06.md for the full grounding detail first.

founderCommand.title: Unblock ResumeBuilder Story 2 (PostHog insight updates)
founderCommand.body: Story 1 (analytics identity/alias hardening) shipped and merged 07-07 — 12/12 tests independently reverified. Story 2 is intentionally blocked: the simulator's secure-field automation can't drive a real sign-in, so nobody has confirmed $identify/$create_alias actually fires yet. That's the exact mechanism that fixes the "one tester account = 22/23 of all activity" problem, so shipping Story 2 without confirming it defeats the point.
founderCommand.prompt: In the ResumeBuilder IOS APP repo, do one manual sign-in on a real device or the simulator (type the password by hand rather than automating the secure field) to trigger the new PostHog $identify/$create_alias wiring. Confirm one fresh $identify or $create_alias row lands in PostHog project 270848. Once confirmed, proceed to Story 2 (PostHog insight updates) using the corrected event names and the founder-exclusion rule.

founderCommand.title: Close the loop on WP-32 / 33 / 34
founderCommand.body: Ran in Codex/Cursor and reported done — but the packet files in Agentic OS still said 'not started' as of 07-05. Note: Agentic OS commit c2d0fc8 (07-05) parked WP-34 via EXD-019; verify 32/33 before acting.
founderCommand.prompt: In the Agentic OS repo, update work packets WP-32, WP-33, WP-34 (executive-os/work-packets/) to reflect completed work. For each: read the packet, ask me what was actually done and where the output lives (PR links, files, drafts), verify the evidence exists, then update the Status line and add a dated Progress entry. Commit and push.

founderCommand.title: Three decisions sitting in NEXT-MOVES
founderCommand.body: RunSmart Hebrew playbook — approve or park? Legal entity — Israeli Ltd. vs self-employed? Dead 'Upgrade to Premium' button on Resumely web — hide, waitlist, or wire checkout (recommended: hide until Gate A).
founderCommand.prompt: Read executive-os/NEXT-MOVES.md in the Agentic OS repo. I want to decide the three Shaping items now. Walk me through them one at a time with a recommendation each, record my choices as EXD rows in EXECUTIVE-DECISIONS.md, and promote any that need work into work packets.

founderCommand.title: Two 5-minute calls with no date
founderCommand.body: Voice-coach flag (RunSmart) — flip it or park it with a review date, open since mid-June. Michal session — pick the date for the live Gemini setup (WP-33 output is ready to use).

tracks.name: Michal / AI Audit Toolkit
tracks.standing: Everything is drafted (4 Gems, Voice doc, privacy rules). The only thing missing is a scheduled session with her Gemini account.

items.text: WP-33 prep ran in Cursor (per founder)
Schedule the live session with Michal. That's the whole blocker.
After the session: file the first toolkit template so the pilot feeds the AI Audit Toolkit product.

prompts.label: Run the live session (when scheduled)
prompts.text: I'm in a live session with Michal's Gemini account now. Read docs/track-c-meeting-runbook.md in the Michal repo and walk me through it step by step: account audit, stand up the 4 Gems from gems/, PII red-team, confirm the dual-practice framing with her. No client PII in anything we produce.

traffic.label: Resumely — people opening the app per week (founder excluded)
traffic.story: The launch push worked (26 people, most tried a fit check), then traffic died. This is the number WP-31/32 have to move.

traffic.label: RunSmart — installs per week
traffic.story: Steadier than Resumely, but 0% of installers ever complete a run — volume isn't the problem here, the plan→run step is.

funnels.name: Resumely
funnels.story: Corroborated by a fresh Supabase + PostHog production readout (06-17 to 07-06, iOS only): 51 launchers → 9 upload-CTA tappers → 4 file-selectors → 7 uploaders → 4 job-added → 1 optimization completer → 0 clean export successes. Same wall, same conclusion: fix export before spending on traffic or monetization. Full readout: ResumeBuilder IOS APP repo, docs/qa/reports/supabase-post-live-current-state-2026-07-06.md.

rows.runsmart: plan→run — 1 of 19 got a plan, 0 ran

activationHeadline.note: No monetization / paid ads until these move (EXD-013). Both funnels founder/QA/bot-excluded per the exclusion rule. Analytics identity hardening shipped 07-07 (PostHog $identify/$create_alias wiring) so future reads can exclude the tester account that owned 22/23 of all Supabase activity — pending one manual sign-in to confirm it actually fires (see Founder Command).

clocks.what: Activation re-read, both apps (7 immature users each mature by then)
EXD-015 review — did Resumely hit 20% real activation in 30 days?
Marc/Garmin written confirmation on fees + certification checklist

kk: Both apps passed App Store review and are live (confirmed 07-07): RunSmart 1.0.7(21), Resumely 1.3(8).
Both 0% real D7 activation on mature App Store cohorts (Readout #2).
Resumely wall = export (8 uploaded, 2 optimized, 0 real exports ever; corroborated 07-06 by a fresh Supabase+PostHog readout, 7 uploaders/4 job-added/1 optimized/0 exported).
Traffic collapsed post-launch-push; WP-29 web funnel fixed + verified.
One backend tester account owned 22/23 of all Resumely Supabase optimizations pre-hardening — analytics identity/alias wiring shipped 07-07 (Story 1) to fix this going forward.

Garmin: brand attribution + Internal-Test-vs-Commercial tiering are well-grounded in Garmin's public docs (matches 3 real rejections). The exact Gate 1-4 checklist, the 30-day historical-data rule, and "NO fees" are not — "NO fees" is directly contradicted by Garmin's own Agreement/FAQ/Health API page. See RunSmart Web docs/garmin-application/22-OFFICIAL-REQUIREMENTS-VS-MARC-NOTES-2026-07-06.md.
ku: Do the 7 immature installs/app convert by the 07-12 re-read?
Does FB-group / Hebrew-first posting actually move traffic?
Will the manual sign-in test confirm $identify/$create_alias actually fires? (Blocks Resumely Story 2.)
Will Marc/Garmin confirm the fee structure and certification checklist in writing before Commercial-tier Garmin work resumes?
Why does no runner start after a plan? (WP-15 fix shipped in 1.0.7(21) — re-read 07-08+.)
Voice-coach flag: flip or keep parked? No decision date.
uk: Michal Track C fully drafted — blocked only on her live Gemini account.

WP files lag Codex/Cursor sessions — dashboards lie until packets are updated. Two Codex sessions found on detached HEAD (ResumeBuilder iOS APP, RunSmart Web) 07-06/07 — branched and preserved, but a recurring risk worth remembering before trusting 'no local changes.'

status.json's needsDecision still lists "RunSmart iOS: if build 8 is rejected again" — stale, from before 1.0.7(21) shipped and passed review. Not a portfolio-hq bug; RunSmart iOS's own task files need a refresh to clear it. Same staleness pattern flagged by ./agentic-os verify for COO-LATEST-REVIEW.md (references build 18, current is build 21).
ResumeBuilder IOS APP is missing tasks/ERRORS.md and docs/agent-os/project-context.md — flagged as a required-read gap by two separate Codex sessions now.
RunSmart iOS has ~30 untracked Finder-duplicate '* 2.swift'/'* 2.md' files cluttering the repo — pre-existing, same issue already named in status.json's blockers as blocking clean archives.
uu: Does the PostHog leak run both ways (Resumely → RunSmart project)?
Do other dashboards carry founder/QA contamination (the 50% inflation pattern)?
Is 'activation' the right north star before there's traffic to activate?

weekPriorities.title: Resumely — confirm Story 2 unblock, then fix the export wall
weekPriorities.body: Do the one manual sign-in test to confirm PostHog identity wiring fires, then resume Story 2 (insight updates) and the WP-36 export-friction diagnostic. Distribution: publish WP-31 Hebrew ASO and post the WP-32 FB-group drafts — traffic is the binding constraint; 20%/30d is not reachable at 4–5 people/week.

weekPriorities.title: RunSmart — verify the WP-15 fix moved the needle; hold Garmin for a written fee answer
weekPriorities.body: 1.0.7(21) shipped the first-run activation fix. Re-run the PostHog funnel 07-08+ for build-21-only users. Garmin stays maintenance-only (EXD-015); before resuming WP-24/26/27/28, get Marc/Garmin to confirm fees + certification checklist in writing — the 07-06 research pass found "NO fees" is contradicted by Garmin's own public docs.

weekPriorities.title: Michal — schedule the live Gemini session
weekPriorities.body: Track C fully drafted. One calendar invite unblocks the first paid pilot of the OS.

weekPriorities.title: OS hygiene — keep the record true
weekPriorities.body: End every Codex/Cursor session with 'update the work packet' and 'create a branch before committing' — two Codex sessions this week were found sitting on detached HEAD. Clear the stranded-work board (see Today tab count) and the ResumeBuilder iOS APP missing-file gap (tasks/ERRORS.md, docs/agent-os/project-context.md).
